title: Top-level fact variables
description: Use ansible_facts["name"] instead of injected ansible_* fact variables (removed in 2.24)

detection.approach: Scan Jinja2 expressions for ansible_* variable references that are known facts

example_violation:
- name: Show hostname
  ansible.builtin.debug:
    msg: "Host is {{ ansible_hostname }}"
example_pass:
- name: Show hostname
  ansible.builtin.debug:
    msg: "Host is {{ ansible_facts["hostname"] }}"

title: play_hosts magic variable
description: Use ansible_play_batch instead of deprecated play_hosts variable (removed in 2.23)

detection.approach: Scan Jinja2 expressions for play_hosts variable

remediation.strategy: Simple string replacement in Jinja2 expressions

example_violation:
- name: Show play hosts
  ansible.builtin.debug:
    msg: "Hosts: {{ play_hosts }}"
example_pass:
- name: Show play hosts
  ansible.builtin.debug:
    msg: "Hosts: {{ ansible_play_batch }}"

title: Empty when conditional
description: Empty when: conditional is deprecated; remove it or add an explicit condition (2.23)

detection.approach: Detect when: with empty string or null value in tasks

example_violation:
- name: Always runs
  ansible.builtin.debug:
    msg: "This always runs"
  when: ""
example_pass:
- name: Always runs
  ansible.builtin.debug:
    msg: "This always runs"

title: action as mapping
description: action: with a mapping value is deprecated; use string form or module key directly (2.23)

detection.approach: Detect action: key with dict/mapping value

remediation.strategy: Convert action mapping to module key with args

example_violation:
- name: Copy file
  action:
    module: copy
    src: a
    dest: /tmp/b
example_pass:
- name: Copy file
  ansible.builtin.copy:
    src: a
    dest: /tmp/b

title: paramiko_ssh connection plugin
description: paramiko_ssh connection plugin is deprecated; use ssh connection instead (removed in 2.21)

detection.approach: Detect connection: paramiko_ssh or ansible_connection: paramiko_ssh

example_violation:
- name: Example play
  hosts: all
  connection: paramiko_ssh
  tasks:
    - name: Ping
      ansible.builtin.ping:
example_pass:
- name: Example play
  hosts: all
  connection: ssh
  tasks:
    - name: Ping
      ansible.builtin.ping:

title: !!omap / !!pairs YAML tags
description: !!omap and !!pairs YAML tags are deprecated; standard YAML mappings preserve order in Python 3.7+ (2.23)

detection.approach: Scan YAML content for !!omap or !!pairs tags

title: Empty args keyword
description: Empty args: keyword on a task is deprecated; remove it (2.23)

detection.approach: Detect args: with null value in tasks

example_violation:
- name: Run command
  ansible.builtin.command: whoami
  args:

title: tree / oneline callback plugins
description: tree and oneline callback plugins are removed in 2.23; choose an alternative

detection.approach: Detect callback_plugins: tree/oneline or stdout_callback = tree/oneline in ansible.cfg

title: follow_redirects string boolean
description: follow_redirects: yes/no (string) is deprecated in url lookup; use true/false boolean (2.22)

detection.approach: Detect follow_redirects: yes or follow_redirects: no in lookup args

example_violation:
- name: Fetch URL
  ansible.builtin.debug:
    msg: "{{ lookup("url", "https://example.com", follow_redirects="yes") }}"
example_pass:
- name: Fetch URL
  ansible.builtin.debug:
    msg: "{{ lookup("url", "https://example.com", follow_redirects=true) }}"

title: include_vars ignore_files as string
description: include_vars ignore_files must be a list, not a string (2.24)

detection.approach: Detect ignore_files: with string value in include_vars tasks

remediation.strategy: Wrap string value in a YAML list

example_violation:
- name: Include vars
  ansible.builtin.include_vars:
    dir: vars/
    ignore_files: "*.bak"
example_pass:
- name: Include vars
  ansible.builtin.include_vars:
    dir: vars/
    ignore_files:
      - "*.bak"

title: Third-party strategy plugin
description: Third-party strategy plugins are deprecated; only ansible.builtin strategies are supported (2.23)
example_violation:
- name: Example play
  hosts: all
  strategy: mitogen_linear
  tasks:
    - name: Ping
      ansible.builtin.ping:
example_pass:
- name: Example play
  hosts: all
  strategy: linear
  tasks:
    - name: Ping
      ansible.builtin.ping:

title: Invalid inventory variable names
description: Inventory variable names must be valid Python identifiers (enforced in 2.23)

detection.approach: Validate variable names in host/group vars against Python identifier rules

remediation.strategy: Rename is mechanical but may break references

title: Legacy k=v merged with args
description: Mixing inline k=v arguments with args: mapping is deprecated (2.23)

detection.approach: Detect tasks with both inline k=v and args: mapping

remediation.strategy: Move k=v params into args mapping

example_violation:
- name: Copy file
  ansible.builtin.copy: src=a
  args:
    dest: /tmp/b
example_pass:
- name: Copy file
  ansible.builtin.copy:
    src: a
    dest: /tmp/b

title: first_found auto-splitting paths
description: first_found lookup auto-splitting paths on delimiters is deprecated (2.23)

detection.approach: Detect first_found terms containing comma or colon delimiters

remediation.strategy: Split string term into YAML list

example_violation:
- name: Find file
  ansible.builtin.debug:
    msg: "{{ lookup("first_found", "a.yml,b.yml") }}"
example_pass:
- name: Find file
  ansible.builtin.debug:
    msg: "{{ lookup("first_found", ["a.yml", "b.yml"]) }}"

title: Inventory script missing _meta
description: Inventory scripts must include _meta.hostvars in JSON output (enforced in 2.23)

detection.approach: Analyze inventory script output for missing _meta key

remediation.strategy: Informational only -- requires modifying external scripts

example_violation:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# inventory script without _meta
import json
print(json.dumps({"all": {"hosts": ["host1"]}}))

title: Broken conditional expressions
description: Conditional expressions that fail Jinja2 parsing will error in 2.23 instead of being silently ignored

detection.approach: Parse when: values as Jinja2 expressions and flag parse failures

remediation.strategy: Depends on specific breakage -- AI review needed

example_violation:
- name: Conditional
  ansible.builtin.debug:
    msg: "test"
  when: foo == (bar
example_pass:
- name: Conditional
  ansible.builtin.debug:
    msg: "test"
  when: foo == bar
